violations.text: The dish washer located in the kitchen was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2026
The lights in the kitchen were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2026

Caeser salad was observed at 51 degrees Fahrenheit in cold well for service. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, the food item had just been prepared prior to service. The food item was moved to reach-in freezer to rapidly cool. Food must be 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below prior to placing for service in cold well. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the following areas: -Behind equipment in the kitchen - Pantry room -Cafeteria The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to continue to work with a licensed pest control company to eliminate pests. Establishment is to clean any and all areas where droppings were observed with appropriate means of sanitizing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

The door to the outside, located in the cafeteria by storage, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025

The floors throughout the storage room have an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2025
The floor to the left of the dishwasher area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the gymnasium, food pantry, and equipment closet. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to continue increased pest control. Establishment is to fully and completely empty and clean the food pantry, and equipment closet. All droppings in gymnasium are to be cleaned and sanitized. All areas where droppings are present are to be cleaned using appropriated means of cleaning and sanitizing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2024

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the following areas -The storage room -Food pantry closet The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to continue to work with a licensed pest control company to eliminate pests. Establishment is to increase pest control. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings with appropriate means of sanitizing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen storage area (stove). Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the following areas -The storage room -Behind equipment in the kitchen -3-bay sink area -Cafeteria The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to continue to work with a licensed pest control company to eliminate pests. Establishment is to increase pest control. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings with appropriate means of sanitizing. Pest control was present at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen storage area (stove). Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the following areas -The storage room -Behind equipment in the kitchen -3-bay sink area -Storage closet -Pantry room The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to work with a licensed pest control company to eliminate pests. Establishment is to increase pest control. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings with appropriate means of sanitizing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen storage area (stove). Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Corrective Action - Establishment must increase pest control, establishment must have licensed pest control do a full evaluation of establishment. Establishment is to clean and sanitize under all kitchen equipment, in the closet adjoining the kitchen, and in the community closet to eliminate all droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

The kitchen and closets in cafeteria has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris and droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024
Refrigerator door gasket located on the center milk case behind the serving line were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2023

The coving behind the serving line is in is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Coving must be maintained in good condition for proper cleaning. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2023
